SMALL CLAIMS HEARING CALENDAR OF APR. 03, 2019. APPEARANCE: PLAINTIFF PRESENT WITH SPANISH INTERPRETER ANDREA POLLOCK #301700, AND DEFENDANT PRESENT WITH SPANISH INTERPRETER JEAN GARASCIA #301350, PARTIES WERE PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. AFTER HEARING THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT TAKES THIS MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED BY THE COURT. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED
